title: UiPath (PATH) Q4 Earnings: The Dawn of the Agentic Enterprise and the Shift to Autonomous AI
text: UiPath released Q4 2026 earnings results highlighting the company's transition to agentic enterprise solutions. Company achieved full-year GAAP profitability for the first time. Q4 revenue of $481 million exceeded analyst forecasts of $464.88 million, representing 14% year-over-year growth and +3.47% revenue surprise. However, earnings per share came in at $0.19, below the anticipated $0.26, marking a -26.92% miss. Stock surged 6.82% in after-hours trading to $11.93, driven by revenue beat and strengthening strategic positioning in artificial intelligence. Key metrics show company is shifting focus to agentic AI and autonomous enterprise automation. CEO emphasized the company's unique ability to combine deterministic automation, agentic automation, and orchestration in unified platform. Management guided for Q1 revenue of $395-400 million, with full-year guidance of $1.754-1.759 billion. The company is positioning itself as infrastructure for enterprise AI and automation transformation, with agentic solutions becoming core to go-to-market strategy.
